prompt: Read retrieval_roadmap.md and IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md, then audit the project against the roadmap. Report: (1) which roadmap items are implemented, (2) which are missing, (3) any obvious gaps between docs and code. Use list_files/read_file. Do not modify code.
summary: Refreshed plan after a recovery signal. Stabilize the current phase, avoid repeating failed actions, and finish with explicit verification.
strategyNotes: Prompt tokens are at 15137/16000 with low-signal assistant output

recoveryBranches: B1 Narrow evidence: Re-read the smallest set of files and compare the current state against the task objective before taking another action.
B2 Switch to explicit verification: Stop making new edits and run the narrowest verification path or state inspection needed to prove what is actually true.
B3 Report blocked state: Stop mutating and produce a concrete blocked-state report with the failed strategy, observed evidence, and next question.

steps.title: Survey the workspace
steps.objective: Identify the repo areas and files most relevant to the task.

steps.title: Inspect the critical implementation details
steps.objective: Read the narrowest set of files needed to confirm the current behavior.

steps.title: Apply the smallest coherent code change
steps.objective: Implement the feature or fix with minimal unrelated churn.

steps.title: Verify the result
steps.objective: Check the final state, run the relevant validation, and confirm completion honestly.
